title: Assemblies should include version information
description: The AssemblyVersion attribute is used to specify the version number of an assembly. An assembly is a compiled unit of code, which can be marked with a version number by applying the attribute to an assembly’s source code file. The AssemblyVersion attribute is useful for many reasons: Versioning: The attribute allows developers to track and manage different versions of an assembly.
recommendation: Refactor to eliminate the flagged pattern.

checks.message: Assembly should include version information using [assembly: AssemblyVersion(...)].
